mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tenant ( id, name, code, status, remark, package_id, lifecycle_status, frozen_reason, frozen_time, cancelled_reason, cancelled_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{packageId}, #{lifecycleStatus}, #{frozenReason}, #{frozenTime}, #{cancelledReason}, #{cancelledTime}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_tenant SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, package_id = #{packageId}, lifecycle_status = #{lifecycleStatus}, frozen_reason = #{frozenReason}, frozen_time = #{frozenTime}, cancelled_reason = #{cancelledReason}, cancelled_time = #{cancelledTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, status, remark, package_id, lifecycle_status, frozen_reason, frozen_time, cancelled_reason, cancelled_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM sys_tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_tenant SET lifecycle_status = 'FROZEN', frozen_reason = #{reason}, frozen_time = #{frozenTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE sys_tenant SET lifecycle_status = 'ACTIVE', frozen_reason = NULL, frozen_time = NULL, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false

UPDATE sys_tenant SET lifecycle_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_reason = #{reason}, cancelled_time = #{cancelledTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
